zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Furnival於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Thomas de Furnival16歲，母親Joan Despenser18歲。她於1309年之前與John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年2月20日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年82歲，埋葬在英國越可爾韋斯特 坦費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Furnival于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Thomas de Furnival16岁，母亲Joan Despenser18岁。她于1309年之前与John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年2月20日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年82岁，埋葬在英国越可爾韋斯特 坦費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Furnival was born about 1280, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Furnival, was 16 and her mother, Joan Despenser, was 18. She married John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham before 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 February 1361, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Furnival est née environ 1280, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Furnival, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Joan Despenser, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham avant 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1361, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à West Tanfield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Furnival um 1280 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Furnival 16 und ihre Mutter Joan Despenser 18. Sie hat vor 1309 John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1361 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Furnival è nata il circa 1280 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Furnival, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Joan Despenser, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham prima del 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1361, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Furnivalが約1280年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Furnivalは16歳，母Joan Despenserは18歳であった。1309年以前にJohn Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年2月20日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで82歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト タンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Furnival(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Furnival(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Despenser(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1309년 이전 John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 2월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 탠필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Sheffield, Yorkshire, England: Sheffield, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Furnival nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Furnival, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joan Despenser, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham antes 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1361, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em West Tanfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Furnival родилась около 1280 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Furnival было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Despenser, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham перед 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1361 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности вест танфиелд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Furnival nació aproximadamente 1280, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Furnival, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Joan Despenser, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham antes de 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1361, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en West Tanfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
